title: Free Ebooks Library
subtitle: Classic texts, freely shared
meta_description: Free ebooks on Arunachala and the teachings of Sri Ramana Maharshi — The Glory of Arunachala, The Essence of the Ribhu Gita, and more, freely downloadable.
body_html:
Free downloadable ebooks on Arunachala, Ramana Maharshi, and the path of self-enquiry.

Disclaimer: the e-books offered here have been gathered from sources that already make them freely accessible. We neither charge for nor derive revenue from their distribution; full copyright remains with the original authors and publishers. If you hold rights to a work hosted here and would prefer it removed or credited differently, please write to info@arunachalasamudra.in and we will respond promptly.

Available now

  • The Glory of Arunachala — A classic account of the sacred hill, its legends, and its place in the heart of devotees.
  • The Essence of the Ribhu Gita — Selected verses of the Ribhu Gita — a text Ramana Maharshi held in the highest regard for direct non-dual instruction.

More titles are being added. (Upload each PDF to /static/ebooks/ or your storage, then list it here or via the admin panel.)
notes: Built from folder PDFs; .in CMS list was empty.
